hero.title: Your business could be growing much more — with far less effort.

items.q: My business is small. Is digital transformation for me?
items.a: Absolutely. Digital transformation is especially powerful for small businesses — you compete with larger players, automate processes and reach more clients with fewer resources.

items.q: Do I need a large investment?
items.a: No. We build solutions for every budget. What matters is starting with a clear strategy and scaling as results come in.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: It depends on the strategy, but first results typically appear within 30 to 90 days. Some actions — like paid ads — can generate immediate results.
No. Getboost integrates AI in a practical, accessible way — you get simple tools while the technology works behind the scenes.
Yes. The first diagnostic session is completely free and with no commitment — a chance to see where your business can grow.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The story behind the strategy
about.story: With over 20 years of experience in digital marketing, I help companies find their voice and grow sustainably. I believe every brand has a unique story to tell.
about.heroSubtitle: Over 20 years helping businesses transform their digital presence into real, sustainable growth.
about.storyExtended: I believe digital marketing isn't just about tools or tactics. It's about deeply understanding your business, your audience, and creating strategies that generate real, measurable impact. Every project is treated as if it were my own.
about.quote: I'd love to know your project and work with you. Let's create something extraordinary.

simulator.title: Price Simulator
simulator.heroTitle: Your business isn't truly online yet — and that's holding back your growth.
simulator.heroSubtitle: Simulate in less than 60 seconds the investment needed to create a professional, automated digital presence ready for the future.
simulator.howItWorksSubtitle: 3 simple steps to get your estimate
simulator.step1Desc: Select the type of solution and the services you need.
simulator.step2Desc: Indicate the complexity level and your business size.
simulator.step3Desc: Get an estimated price range instantly.
simulator.whatSolution: What type of solution are you looking for?
simulator.proposalSubtitle: Fill in your details and receive a proposal within 48h
simulator.whenStart: When do you want to start?
simulator.requestSentMsg: You'll receive a personalized proposal within 48 business hours.
simulator.specialistDesc: Specialist in Digital Marketing and Digital Transformation with over 20 years of experience. I help local businesses and SMEs modernize their operations with strategy, technology, and artificial intelligence — always focused on results.
simulator.readyTitle: Ready to discover the ideal investment?
simulator.readySubtitle: Simulate now and receive a personalized proposal with no commitment.
simulator.fillNameEmail: Please fill in your name and email.

faqs.q: Does the simulator give a final price?
faqs.a: No. The simulator provides an indicative estimate. The final value is defined after a personalized analysis of your project.
Yes, completely free and without obligation. You can simulate as many times as you want.

faqs.q: How long until I receive a proposal?
faqs.a: After submitting the form, you'll receive a personalized proposal within 48 business hours.
Yes! You can select as many services as you want. The simulator calculates the total combined investment.
The values shown are indicative and do not include VAT. The final value with VAT will be itemized in the proposal.

faqs.q: Is there any commitment to using the simulator?
faqs.a: Absolutely none. The simulator is an informative tool to help you plan your investment.

investors.seoDesc: Invest in startups and digital projects with high growth potential. Scalable SaaS models with integrated AI, led by Getboost Digital.
investors.heroTitle: Invest in Startups and Digital Projects with High Growth Potential
investors.heroSubtitle: We're building an ecosystem of SaaS products for expanding markets. We're now opening opportunities for investors who want to get in from the start.
investors.opportunitiesSubtitle: We offer different modalities to suit each investor's profile.

angel.title: Angel Investment
angel.desc: Initial capital in exchange for equity. Ideal for individual investors who want to support early-stage startups with mentorship and networking.

safe.title: SAFE
safe.desc: Simple Agreement for Future Equity — convertible investment without defining immediate valuation. Simple, fast, and favorable for both parties.

equity.title: Direct Equity
equity.desc: Direct participation in the company's share capital. Suitable for investors who want a clear position from the start.

seed.title: Seed Investment
seed.desc: Pre-seed and seed rounds to accelerate product development and market validation. For funds and strategic investors.

investors.portfolioSubtitle: Startups and SaaS products at different stages of development.
investors.founderDesc1: Getboost Digital has over 20 years of experience in digital marketing, web development, and digital transformation. With over 1,500 projects delivered, he combines strategic vision with technical execution to build scalable digital products.
investors.founderDesc2: He currently leads the development of a SaaS startup ecosystem focused on high-growth markets, with AI integration and a product-led growth approach.
investors.ctaFinalTitle: Ready to invest in the future?
investors.ctaFinalSubtitle: Join us in building digital solutions with real impact.

qook.subtitle: Restaurant Management (Brazil)
qook.tagline: SaaS for restaurant, café, and dark kitchen management. Rapidly expanding Brazilian market.

hostify.subtitle: Accommodation Management (Brazil)
hostify.tagline: Platform for guesthouses, hotels, and local accommodations. Fragmented market with great digitalization needs.

motivae.subtitle: AI Personal Coach (Global)
motivae.tagline: Productivity and personal development app with AI. Multilingual with global potential.

trackfy.subtitle: Vehicle Tracking
trackfy.tagline: SaaS for tracking personal and business vehicles in real time.

prosafe360.subtitle: Workplace Safety
prosafe360.tagline: SaaS for workplace safety management, occupational health, and legal compliance.

pikto.subtitle: Time & HR Management
pikto.tagline: SaaS platform for employee time tracking, attendance management, and human resources.

brandingGuide.seoDesc: Complete guide to building a strong and authentic personal brand online.
brandingGuide.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to build a strong, authentic personal brand that positions you as a reference in your market.
brandingGuide.s1Subtitle: Define who you are, what you do and for whom — clearly and distinctively.
s1Step1Items: Define your personal mission in 1 sentence
List your unique strengths and skills
Discover what sets you apart from other professionals
s1Step2Items: Define your ideal client or audience profile
Identify your audience's pains and needs
Position yourself in a specific, relevant niche
s1Step3Items: Define your communication tone (formal, casual, inspiring)
Create 3-5 content pillars aligned with your brand
brandingGuide.s2Subtitle: Plan and publish content that reinforces your personal brand on each platform.
s2LinkedIn: Post 3-5x per week with professional insights
Share case studies and lessons learned
Comment and interact with industry leaders
Use long-form articles to demonstrate authority
s2Instagram: Create educational carousels with practical tips
Use Stories to show your professional day-to-day
Post Reels with valuable content under 60s
Maintain a consistent visual aesthetic in your feed
s2Facebook: Participate in relevant groups in your niche
Share blog content and opinion articles
Create events and lives to interact with your audience
Use Facebook for networking and community
s2Blog: Create evergreen content that attracts organic traffic
Use your blog as your personal brand's central hub
brandingGuide.s3Subtitle: Ready-to-use templates to present yourself professionally and memorably.
brandingGuide.s3Bio1Template: I help [target audience] achieve [desired result] through [method/service]. With [X years] of experience in [field], I've helped [number] professionals/companies achieve [concrete result]. 📩 [CTA]
brandingGuide.s3Bio2Template:
🎯 [What you do] for [whom]
💡 [Main result you deliver]
📍 [Location]
🔗 [Link to free resource or website]
brandingGuide.s3PitchTemplate: Hi, I'm [name] and I help [target audience] [solve specific problem]. Most [audience] face [main pain point], and I help them overcome it with [solution/method]. In the last [time], I've helped [number] clients achieve [measurable result].
brandingGuide.s4Subtitle: Practical guide to creating a consistent and memorable professional image.
s4PhotoItems: Take photos with a neutral background and good lighting
Include close-ups, mid-range and work shots
Keep an approachable and confident expression
s4VisualItems: Choose 2-3 colors that represent your brand
Create consistent templates for posts and presentations
Use the same avatar/profile photo across all platforms
Develop a personal logo or monogram
brandingGuide.s5Subtitle: A step-by-step roadmap to launch your personal brand in just 30 days.
s5Week1Items: Complete the self-knowledge and values exercise
Define your target audience and value proposition
Create or update your LinkedIn profile
s5Week2Items: Create your website or personal page
Write your bio and elevator pitch
s5Week3Items: Publish your first valuable article or post
Start active networking (5 connections/day on LinkedIn)
Share your professional story on social media
s5Week4Items: Request recommendations from colleagues and clients
Create your first free resource (ebook, checklist)
Set goals for the next 90 days
brandingGuide.ctaTitle: Ready to build your personal brand?
brandingGuide.ctaDesc: Download this guide as a PDF and start implementing your personal branding strategy today.

confirmation.subject: Your meeting is confirmed

confirmation.linkNote: You will receive a link for the video call before the meeting. If you need to reschedule or cancel, please reply to this email.

droneCalculator.title: Drone Photography & Video Plans
droneCalculator.subtitle: Choose the ideal plan for your project and automatically calculate the final cost based on your location.
droneCalculator.calcDesc: Enter the address where the session will take place to calculate the total price including travel.
droneCalculator.infoNote: Distance is calculated from Figueira da Foz. The first 15 km are free!
droneCalculator.toastError: Error calculating distance. Please try again later.
droneCalculator.notFoundError: Address not found. Please be more specific.

seoHome.title: Getboost — Growth machine with Marketing, Software and AI
